definition:
1. to get quite ready, equip , (Lucian):—;Pass., perfect participle διεσκευασμένοι dressed , (Plutarch): —;Mid. to prepare for oneself, provide , (Thucydides): to equip oneself , (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. Mid., διασκευασάμενος τὴν οὐσίαν having disposed of one's  property, (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
